Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, And Requests For Production; Plaintiffs Motion For An Order Deeming Admission Of Requests For Admission; And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kelly Van Aken, Esq. 415-539-3100 of Kellogg & Van Aken LLP for Plaintiff/Moving party.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DANIEL SNOWDEN, KRISTY NGUYEN's Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, And Requests For Production; Plaintiffs Motion For An Order Deeming Admission Of Requests For Admission; And Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiffs' unopposed Motion to Compel Discovery is GRANTED. Sanctions in the amount of $1,460 are awarded in favor of plaintiff and against defendant. Plaintiffs shall serve notice of this ruling by express mail.

Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Set For Trial On Jan-29-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
